hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    core = open('.claude/memory/aurora-core/MEMORY.md').read()
    client = open('.claude/memory/aurora-client/MEMORY.md').read()
    context = '## Conventions aurora-core (lire avant d\'agir)\n\n' + core + '\n\n---\n\n## Conventions aurora-client (lire avant d\'agir)\n\n' + client
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': context}}))
except Exception as e:
    sys.stderr.write(str(e))
"
